title: iria autumnalis var. geminata
intro: Iria autumnalis var. geminata, also known as twinflower, is a flowering plant native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of twinflower include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of twinflower include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of twinflower often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
